Package index

One-shot pipeline

Parse a .lss file and render the review document in a single call. The most common entry points for everyday use.

lss_to_docx()
Convert a .lss file to a Word review document
lss_to_pdf()
Convert a .lss file to a PDF review document
lss_audit_to_docx()
Convert a .lss file to a Word audit-only document
lss_audit_to_pdf()
Convert a .lss file to a PDF audit-only document

Parse

Read a LimeSurvey .lss (XML) export into a structured R object.

parse_lss()
Parse a LimeSurvey .lss file

Audit

Inspect the parsed survey for integrity issues a reviewer would otherwise miss – missing translations, dangling references, malformed relevance expressions, structural inconsistencies.

audit_lss()
Audit a parsed LimeSurvey structure for reviewable anomalies

Render

Lower-level entry points if you want to control parsing and rendering separately, or render the audit alone.

render_lss_docx()
Render a parsed LimeSurvey structure to a Word document
render_lss_audit_docx()
Render the audit alone as a focused Word document
lss_docx_to_pdf()
Convert a .docx to .pdf locally

Package overview

lssdoc lssdoc-package
lssdoc: Generate Word Review Documents from LimeSurvey '.lss' Files

On this page
